aether_damaged.description: Aether post-storm: soft-spoken, intelligent, frightened but masking. Low stability gives breath/tremor. The damage is in the delivery, not the words.

aether_healthy.description: Aether steadier / masking. Higher stability = no tremor. Used for calmer beats.

aether_recorded.description: Aether-when-she-was-whole: the pre-recorded contingency log. Clean, no tremor — 'her before'.

archivist.description: The voice of the FUTURE layer — calm, knowing, slightly amused. Reads the chapter-end seal.
